- [escalation] Mrs. Sarah Lang: Loop monitor alert indicating stuck pattern requiring manual intervention from priority contact wife.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Tier 1 monitor anomaly detected indicating stuck pattern requiring manual intervention.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Tier 1 monitor anomaly detected with same blocker count at threshold, stuck pattern requires manual intervention.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary highlighting a stuck pattern alert in the jeeves-unchained adaptive-loop requiring manual intervention.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Tier 1 monitor alert detecting a stuck pattern in jeeves-unchained adaptive-loop with same_blocker_count=3 requiring manual intervention.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed with some unsuccessful jobs.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert for permanent failure with transient failure marker 429 and no auto-retry.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary flagging the loop-monitor alert about a stuck pattern requiring manual intervention.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary referencing an escalation about loop-monitor alerts.
